message:
refactor: use Duration::from_mins/from_hours for readability

Replace Duration::from_secs(60) → from_mins(1), from_secs(300) →
from_mins(5), from_secs(3600) → from_hours(1), from_secs(86400) →
from_hours(24), and from_secs(604_800) → from_hours(168) across 13
files.  These are semantically identical but make the intent
immediately clear without mental arithmetic.

Affected defaults and test assertions in:
- supervision.rs: RestartConfig::window, SupervisionConfig::restart_window
- actor.rs, app.rs: test restart config windows
- config.rs: ServerConfig idle_timeout
- distributed/recovery.rs: RecoveryConfig::recovery_timeout
- http/h1/server.rs: Http1Config::idle_timeout
- observability/obligation_tracker.rs: leak_age_threshold
- record/distributed_region.rs: DistributedRegionConfig::recovery_timeout
- trace/distributed/collector.rs: SymbolTraceCollector::max_age
- lab/network/harness.rs: SimNode dedup store TTL
- net/dns/cache.rs: CacheConfig min_ttl/max_ttl + test assertions
- sync/pool.rs: PoolConfig idle_timeout/max_lifetime + test assertions
- time/wheel.rs: TimerWheelConfig defaults + test assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -254,7 +254,7 @@ impl Default for DistributedRegionConfig {
             min_quorum: 2,
             replication_factor: 3,
             init_timeout: Duration::from_secs(30),
-            recovery_timeout: Duration::from_secs(60),
+            recovery_timeout: Duration::from_mins(1),
             allow_degraded: true,
             read_consistency: ConsistencyLevel::One,
             write_consistency: ConsistencyLevel::Quorum,

@@ -265,7 +265,7 @@ impl Default for RestartConfig {
     fn default() -> Self {
         Self {
             max_restarts: 3,
-            window: Duration::from_secs(60),
+            window: Duration::from_mins(1),
             backoff: BackoffStrategy::default(),
             restart_cost: 0,
             min_remaining_for_restart: None,
@@ -455,7 +455,7 @@ impl Default for SupervisionConfig {
         Self {
             restart_policy: RestartPolicy::OneForOne,
             max_restarts: 3,
-            restart_window: Duration::from_secs(60),
+            restart_window: Duration::from_mins(1),
             backoff: BackoffStrategy::default(),
             escalation: EscalationPolicy::Stop,
             storm_threshold: None,
